accurate.why: All dollar amounts, percentages, and program descriptions match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the act temporarily extends FAA programs and aviation trust fund taxes and expenditure authority.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the act extends expiring authorities, amending prior statutory expiration dates.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the AIP obligation period through September 30, 2024, and the 39% apportionment reduction.

effective_dates.why: Correctly identifies the May 10-11, 2024, extension dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers AIP funding and apportionment conditions, program extensions, aviation revenue, and counter-UAS extension.

coherent.why: Well-organized by topic with clear bullet points.

concise.why: Strikes a good balance — covers major categories without exhaustively listing every individual program.

correct_entities.why: FAA, Airport Improvement Program, Airport and Airway Trust Fund, and DHS counter-UAS correctly named.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
